name: Course Schedule with Parallel Execution
description: Given a list of courses with prerequisites, implement functions to: (1) detect if all courses can be completed (no cycles), (2) return a valid order to take courses, and (3) compute the minimum number of semesters needed if you can take unlimited courses per semester but must respect prerequisites.
tests:
def test_find_order_basic():
    order = find_order(4, [[1,0],[2,0],[3,1],[3,2]])
    assert len(order) == 4
    assert order.index(0) < order.index(1)
    assert order.index(0) < order.index(2)
    assert order.index(1) < order.index(3)
    assert order.index(2) < order.index(3)
constraints: [a, b] means course b is prerequisite for course a
